overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia walking along a rural dirt path through lush summer countryside. The character passes a wooden shrine, crosses a small wooden bridge over water, and continues past stone ruins under a bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path through grassland with wooden shrine

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path toward a wooden shrine on the hillside

entered.detail: small wooden religious structure on a grassy mound with a pointed roof
tall sunflowers growing alongside the path
mature deciduous tree with thick trunk and spreading branches
worn dirt trail winding through tall grass
tall green grass and wildflowers flanking the path
dense coniferous forest forming the horizon backdrop

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunlit dirt path through lush grassland, approaching a wooden shrine situated on a grassy hill to the right. Sunflowers and tall grass line the trail as a large tree comes into view ahead, with a pine forest visible in the distant background.

events.description: transitioning from dirt path onto wooden bridge over water

agents.ego_description: Geralt crossing the wooden bridge while looking toward the lake visible on the right

entered.detail: rustic wooden plank bridge with simple railings crossing a stream
calm blue lake visible through the trees to the right
dilapidated wooden fence posts alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The path leads to a wooden bridge crossing a small waterway, with a serene lake becoming visible through the trees to the right. Geralt crosses the bridge as broken fence posts line the approach, leaving the wooden shrine behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path alongside ancient stone wall ruins

events.description: exiting bridge and entering area with stone ruins and walls

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking past ancient stone walls and ruins while heading toward a distant tower

entered.detail: weathered stone walls and ruins running parallel to the path
vertical wooden posts marking the path boundary
tall stone tower visible on the horizon to the left

segments.scene_description: After crossing the bridge, Geralt continues along the trail flanked by ancient stone wall ruins on the right. Wooden posts line the path edge, and a distant stone tower becomes visible on the horizon while the lake fades from view.

events.description: path splits into two directions, ego continues on left fork

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaching a fork in the path and continuing along the left trail

entered.detail: wooden directional signpost with arrows at the path intersection
trail splitting into two distinct paths ahead

segments.scene_description: The trail opens into a wider grassland area where the path diverges into two directions. Geralt passes a wooden signpost on the left and continues along the left fork, leaving the stone ruins behind as the landscape becomes more open.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rural dirt path that transitions from a lush, flower-lined trail into an open grassland expanse. It begins with Geralt walking through sunlit grasslands past a wooden shrine and sunflowers, moving toward a large tree with a distant pine forest on the horizon. As the path leads forward, the camera follows him across a wooden bridge over a small waterway, momentarily revealing a serene lake through the trees to the right. The scene then shifts as the lake fades from view and the trail becomes flanked by ancient stone wall ruins and wooden posts, leading toward a distant stone tower. Finally, the landscape opens into a wider grassland where the path diverges, and the camera follows Geralt past a wooden signpost as he takes the left fork and leaves the ruins behind.
